parameters.query:
SELECT 
  document_id,
  status,
  storage_path_pdf,
  storage_path_docx,
  preview_data,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM generated_documents
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
  AND document_type = 'playbook-compliance'
  AND source_type = 'quick_contract'
  AND status = 'generated'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  uc.contract_id,
  uc.contract_name,
  uc.file_name,
  uc.detected_contract_type,
  uc.contract_type_key,
  uc.status as contract_status,
  uc.clause_count,
  uc.created_at as contract_created,

  -- Initiator
  u.first_name as initiator_first_name,
  u.last_name as initiator_last_name,
  u.email as initiator_email,

  -- Company
  c.company_name as initiator_company,
  c.industry as initiator_industry

FROM uploaded_contracts uc
LEFT JOIN users u ON uc.uploaded_by_user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON uc.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE uc.contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}';

SELECT 
  qr.recipient_name,
  qr.recipient_company
FROM quick_contracts qc
JOIN qc_recipients qr ON qr.quick_contract_id = qc.quick_contract_id
WHERE qc.source_contract_id = '{{ $json.contract_id }}'
ORDER BY qr.created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

DELETE FROM generated_documents 
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.contract_id }}'
  AND document_type = 'playbook-compliance'
  AND source_type = 'quick_contract';
 
INSERT INTO generated_documents (
  contract_id,
  document_type,
  source_type,
  document_name,
  storage_path_pdf,
  preview_data,
  generation_params,
  status,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.contract_id }}',
  'playbook-compliance',
  'quick_contract',
  '{{ $json.preview_data.title }}',
  '{{ $json.storage_path_pdf }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.preview_data) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ bucket: $json.pdf_bucket, filename: $json.pdf_filename, public_url: $json.pdf_public_url }) }}'::jsonb,
  'generated',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING document_id, created_at;

INSERT INTO system_events (
  contract_id,
  user_id,
  journey_type,
  step_name,
  status,
  source_system,
  source_identifier,
  context,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.contract_id }}',
  '{{ $('Validate Request').first().json.user_id }}',
  'document_generation',
  'qc_playbook_compliance_generated',
  'completed',
  'n8n',
  '6.6Q QC Playbook Compliance Report',
  '{"document_type": "playbook-compliance", "source_type": "quick_contract"}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
);
